prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `b7256dcd`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 package for `b7256dcd` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b7256dcd/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b7256dcd/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b7256dcd/generator.py).

Rule summary: on a `7` background, each connected `6` component that is orthogonally adjacent to a colored seed pixel is recolored to that seed’s color; all seed pixels disappear to background; untouched `6` components stay `6`. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint matched the official examples, and `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, so I used the hint and did not create `notes.md`. No new primitive was needed.

The generator explicitly builds sparse small disconnected `6` blobs plus singleton donor/orphan seeds with hard adjacency constraints, which keeps the distribution close to the official family. Validation passed: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are in [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7256dcd/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7256dcd/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7256dcd/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7256dcd/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7256dcd/previews/preview_03.png).
